description: Provide working directory, home directory, downloads directory, OS family, and PowerShell version. `Resolve-DownloadsPath` handles platform differences: Windows uses the registry-known `Downloads` shell folder, macOS uses `~/Downloads`, Linux uses XDG `XDG_DOWNLOAD_DIR` if set, otherwise `~/Downloads`.
notes: On Windows, prefer `[Environment]::GetFolderPath` only as fallback — the registry-known folder is the authoritative location and respects user redirection. Use `[Environment]::GetFolderPath('UserProfile') + '\Downloads'` only when nothing better is available.
steps: TDD: `downloads_directory` resolves on Windows / macOS / Linux.
TDD: `os` reports a simple family string (`Windows`, `macOS`, `Linux`).
Author `Private/Context/Resolve-DownloadsPath.ps1` with platform branches and XDG fallback.
Tests use `Mock` to override per-platform branches.
name: [ctx-02] Location and platform context
